hooks.description: Initialize session context, verify BMAD structure, increment session_count
Trigger post-session-analysis workflow before exit. Ensures flywheel heartbeat on every session end, even without DA command.
Fired by post-session-analysis Step 6 when session_count % flywheel.trigger_every_n_sessions == 0. Executes workflow-aggregate.md then workflow-apply.md.
Block direct commits to main. Validate branch naming convention (feature/* or fix/*). Check for deprecated _bmad/bmm/ paths in staged files.
Enforced by validate-pr.yml CI workflow. Verifies that every PR created via gh pr create contains a non-empty --body. PRs with empty description are blocked from merge.
Log sub-agent activation via delegation matrix. Validates that routing went through agent-delegation-matrix.csv before execution.
Persist sub-agent outputs to _bmad-output/. Available in _bmad-output/bmb-creations/ or _bmad-output/test-artifacts/ depending on agent type.
Validate tool parameters against BMAD conventions. Check that file paths use _bmad/core/ not _bmad/bmm/. Check that no write targets main directly.
Log tool results and update session state. If file write: check Gate 3 (Aria) basic validation before confirm.
Fired when high-severity finding detected in post-session-analysis or flywheel-apply. Surfaces single notification line to user. Never auto-applies high severity.
